mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, display_name, role, qwen_api_key, qwen_chat_model, qwen_web_search_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_accounts WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password, display_name, role, qwen_api_key, qwen_chat_model, qwen_web_search_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_accounts WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password, display_name, role, qwen_api_key, qwen_chat_model, qwen_web_search_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM user_accounts WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_accounts SET qwen_api_key = #{qwenApiKey}, qwen_chat_model = #{qwenChatModel}, qwen_web_search_enabled = #{qwenWebSearchEnabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
